definitions.text: i addisjon: med tillegg av (i matematikk skrevet +)
definitions.translation: in addition: with the addition of (written + in mathematics)

examples: varen koster 15 kr per kilo pluss 24 % mva.

definitions.text: brukt foran et tall for å angi at dette har en verdi større enn null
definitions.translation: used before a number to indicate that it has a value greater than zero

definitions.text: brukt etter skolekarakter for å vise at resultatet er litt bedre enn det karakteren står for
definitions.translation: used after a school grade to show that the result is slightly better than the grade indicates
